class="styleguide-2019 base-styles"><div
class="container-fluid startpage__section startpage__section--grey startpage__qrcode-info" id=learn-basics><div
class=row><div
class="col-lg-10 col-12 offset-lg-1 offset-0 qrcode-info__header"><h2 class="heading-h2 heading-h2--center">
I’m new to QR Codes. What should I know?</h2><p
class=paragraph--center>
Glad you asked! Here’s a few basics to get you started.</p></div></div><div
class=row><div
class="col-lg-6 col-12 qrcode-info__img-container">
<img
class=qrcode-info__img loading=lazy src=/wp-content/themes/qr/new_structure/assets/media/images/startpage/v2/hand-qrcodes.png   alt="An illustration of a hand holding three custom QR Codes"  width=1276 height=1611></div><div
class="col-xl-5 col-lg-6 col-12 qrcode-info__accordion-container"><div
class=faq__list id=faqAccordion><div
class=faq__entry><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading1><div
class="heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse1 aria-expanded=true aria-controls=collapse1>
What is a QR Code?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
id=collapse1 data-parent=#faqAccordion class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading1><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body"><p>QR Code is a two-dimensional version of the barcode, typically made up of black and white pixel patterns. Denso Wave, a Japanese subsidiary of the Toyota supplier Denso, developed them for marking components in order to accelerate logistics processes for their automobile production. Now, it has found its way into mobile marketing with the widespread adoption of smartphones. "QR" stands for "Quick Response", which refers to the instant access to the information hidden in the Code.</p><a
href=/qr-code-marketing/qr-codes-basics/
class="button button--medium button--tertiary"data-event-name=cta_clicks
data-click-text="Tell Me More"
data-cta-location="Top Page"
data-brand=QRCG
>Tell me more</a></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading2><div
class="heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse2  aria-controls=collapse2>
What are the benefits of using QR Codes?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
id=collapse2 data-parent=#faqAccordion class="faq__entry-collapse collapse " aria-labelledby=heading2><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body"><p>They are gaining popularity because of their versatility. You can use them to gather feedback to improve your products or services, increase customer engagement with images or videos, or even promote your business via events and coupons. All of these can be done with just a single scan!</p><a
href=/qr-code-marketing/different-types-of-qr-codes/
class="button button--medium button--tertiary"data-event-name=cta_clicks
data-click-text="Tell Me More"
data-cta-location="Top Page"
data-brand=QRCG
>Tell me more</a></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading3><div
class="heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse3  aria-controls=collapse3>
How do I scan QR Codes?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
id=collapse3 data-parent=#faqAccordion class="faq__entry-collapse collapse " aria-labelledby=heading3><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body"><p>Depending on your device, you might already have a built-in QR Code reader or scanner. Open the camera app on your mobile phone and hold it over a Code for a few seconds until a notification pops up. If this doesn’t happen, check your settings and see if QR Code scanning is enabled. Still not working? Don’t worry, all you have to do now is install third-party QR Code readers from your app stores.</p><a
href=/guides/scan-qr-code-android/
class="button button--medium button--tertiary"
>I’m using an Android device</a><a
href=/guides/scan-qr-code-ios/ class="button button--medium button--tertiary">I’m using an Apple device</a></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div
class="cta_bar cta_bar--first"><div
class="container cta-v2 base-styles"><div
class=cta-v2__wrapper><div
class=cta-v2__text-box>
<span
class=cta-v2__go-pro>Go pro</span><h3 class="heading-h3 heading-h3--center cta-v2__title">
Instantly make your <span
class=text-bold>materials better</span></h3><p
class=cta-v2__subtitle>
Add editable and trackable QR Codes on anything you want with full branding and customization features.</p></div><div
class=cta-v2__button>
<a
class="button button--primary button--large"
href=https://app.qr-code-generator.com/site/signup/
data-event-name=get_started_cta
data-click-text="Create free account"
data-cta-location="Mid Page"
data-brand=QRCG
>
Create free account
</a></div></div></div></div><div

How do I create a free QR Code?</h2><p
class=paragraph--center itemprop=description>
We’ll show you how in just three simple steps</p></div></div><div

You may choose from URL, vCard, Plain Text, Email, SMS, Twitter, WiFi, and Bitcoin. However, these free QR Codes are not editable and trackable.</p></div></div></div><div

Enter all the information needed in the fields that appear. This could be a link, contact information, text or any other type of info. Once you’re done, select “Generate.”</p></div></div><div

<object

<img
class="img-fluid steps-scroll__ie-edge-placeholder" loading=lazy src=/wp-content/themes/qr/new_structure/assets/media/images/startpage/v2/startpage-ie-feature3.gif width=1200 height=800 alt="Animation showing how to download the QR code"></div><div
class="col-lg-4 col-md-8 col-12 offset-lg-2 offset-md-2 offset-0 steps-scroll__text-container"><div
class=steps-scroll__text-wrapper><p
class="h4 heading-h4" itemprop=name>

class=row><div
class="col-lg-10 col-12 offset-lg-1 offset-0"><h2 class="heading-h2 heading-h2--center">
Frequently asked questions (FAQs)</h2></div></div><div
class=row><div
class="col-12 faq-section"><div
class=faq-section itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/FAQPage><div
class="h4 heading-h4 faq-section__heading">
Basics</div><div
class=faq-section__box id=generalFaqAccordion1><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading11><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse11 aria-expanded=true aria-controls=collapse11>
What is a QR Code generator?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse11 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion1 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading11><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>It is a niche tool that is used to generate different types of QR Codes. Depending on your purpose, you can use our generator to create QR Codes to open a website, view a PDF file, listen to music, watch Youtube videos, store image files, connect to a WiFi network, and much more. Explore the different types <a
href=/types/ target=_blank>here</a>.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading12><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse12  aria-controls=collapse12>
Are QR Codes free?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse12 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion1 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading12><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>All of our Static QR Codes are free. This includes URL, vCard, Plain text, Email, SMS, Twitter, WiFi, and Bitcoin. Once created, they are yours forever. The only drawback with these types is that you won’t be able to edit the content, so be sure to always test and make sure they work before printing.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading13><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse13  aria-controls=collapse13>
Can I use the generated QR Codes for commercial purposes?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse13 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion1 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading13><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Absolutely!</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading14><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse14  aria-controls=collapse14>
What kind of information can be stored in a QR Code?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse14 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion1 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading14><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>QR Codes are so versatile, they are able to store a variety of information depending on your needs. It can store a URL to make it easier for you to open a page on the web with just a scan. It can also store contact details so that you don’t have to manually type the name, phone number, and email address to save it to your phone. But of course, this is just the tip of the iceberg; you can view more use cases <a
href=/qr-codes-for/ target=_blank>here</a>.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading15><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse15  aria-controls=collapse15>
Is it possible to count the QR Code scans (tracking, analytics, measuring)?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse15 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion1 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading15><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Yes, it is possible with our <a
href=/features/ target=_blank>PRO version</a>. You can track the number of scans, where, and when it was scanned. You can even see which operating system your audience uses on their devices! All of these are important metrics for you to measure your campaigns and use it to improve or even expand.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading16><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse16  aria-controls=collapse16>
How long are QR Codes valid for? Do they expire?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse16 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion1 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading16><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Static QR Codes are valid for as long as you want and will never expire. The only instance where the Code might “expire” is when the link is changed or deleted, rendering it unscannable. We encourage you to create Dynamic Codes so that you have total control as the content or links are replaceable no matter what happens. Plus, it has plenty of other <a
href=/qr-code-marketing/more-information-more-flexibility/ target=_blank>advantages</a> for your campaigns!</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading17><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse17  aria-controls=collapse17>
What does Static and Dynamic QR Code mean?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse17 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion1 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading17><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Once generated, a Static Code cannot be edited and its scans cannot be tracked. Dynamic Code, on the other hand, is very flexible and is virtually indestructible. You can update its content, change/add links, and fix typos; even after print. You can also track the number of scans, including where and when.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading18><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse18  aria-controls=collapse18>
How do I manage QR Codes with a QR Code generator?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse18 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion1 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading18><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>After signing up, you will have the chance to try all the features of our generator free for 14 days. There, you can create Static and Dynamic QR Codes, design with colors and logos, choose frames, save designs as templates, edit the short URLs, set up your own domain, add team members, and many other exciting <a
href=/features/ target=_blank>features</a>.</p></div></div></div></div><div
class="h4 heading-h4 faq-section__heading">
Creating & Designing</div><div
class=faq-section__box id=generalFaqAccordion9><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading91><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse91  aria-controls=collapse91>
Is it possible to create different QR Codes for the same content?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse91 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion9 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading91><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Yes. This is because they have 40 different versions with four error correction levels and eight masking possibilities. This means there are 1280 possible QR Codes for any given input. However, for marketing purposes, only versions 1-7 are used so our generator will typically choose the best version based on the amount of data stored and the best mask to produce a better image in terms of readability.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading92><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse92  aria-controls=collapse92>
Can I customize a QR Code with my company logo or icon?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse92 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion9 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading92><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Definitely! Account signup to our <a
href=/features/ target=_blank>PRO version</a> is required to unlock this feature, but you are welcomed to try all the features free for 14 days!</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading93><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse93  aria-controls=collapse93>
Do QR Codes have to be black and white?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse93 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion9 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading93><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Not at all. You can use your brand or company colors, or whatever color you like. There are 16,777,216 colors using #RRGGBB notation so feel free to play around with the color picker!</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading94><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse94  aria-controls=collapse94>
Can a QR Code be edited/changed?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse94 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion9 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading94><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Absolutely! You can change the content, replace a link, fix a typo—all of these can be done after print. This means you don’t have to reprint a new QR Code every time you change its content (unless you’re changing the design). However, this feature is only available with our <a
href=/features/ target=_blank>PRO version</a>.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading95><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse95  aria-controls=collapse95>
How do I generate a large batch of QR Codes?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse95 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion9 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading95><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Use our <a
href=/qr-code-api/ target=_blank>API</a>, which you can integrate directly into your existing system. You can create either the standard black and white Codes or full customization with colors and designs. Still not sure? Contact us.</p></div></div></div></div><div
class="h4 heading-h4 faq-section__heading">
Scanning & Printing</div><div
class=faq-section__box id=generalFaqAccordion6><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading61><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse61  aria-controls=collapse61>
What graphic formats do the generated QR Codes support?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse61 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion6 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading61><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>You can download them in high-resolution JPG format. To download in PNG, SVG, or even EPS, account signup is required. Please take note that if you require the QR Code image in EPS format, we only offer them in black and white without any designs.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading62><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse62  aria-controls=collapse62>
What should I know before printing my QR Code?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse62 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion6 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading62><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>You need to know the right size, the right contrasting colors, and always test it before printing. We’ve compiled a <a
href=/qr-code-marketing/print-qr-codes-correctly/ target=_blank>printing guide</a> to help you launch the best marketing campaign and to avoid costly errors.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading63><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse63  aria-controls=collapse63>
How to read/scan a QR Code?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse63 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion6 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading63><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>If you’re using an iOS device, just open the camera app and hold it over a QR Code until a notification pops up. Same for Android or other mobile devices, except that if nothing happened, you may want to check your settings and see if QR Code scanning is enabled. Otherwise, search for a reliable QR Code reader in your app store, most of them are free!</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading64><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse64  aria-controls=collapse64>
Can QR Codes be scanned without an app?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse64 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion6 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading64><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Yes! For most iOS and Android users, a QR Code scanner is already built into the native camera app. Simply open the camera app and hold it over any Codes until a notification pops up. You don't even have to press any button to scan the Codes.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading65><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse65  aria-controls=collapse65>
Is there a scan limit for the QR Codes?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse65 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion6 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading65><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>No, they do not have a scan limit.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading66><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse66  aria-controls=collapse66>
Why is my QR Code not working?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse66 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion6 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading66><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>This could be a number of reasons. Your QR Code may not be detected by a scanner because it’s blurry or there isn’t enough contrast between the Code and the background. A simple rule to remember is to make sure the foreground is always darker than the background. Follow our tips <a
href=/qr-code-marketing/print-qr-codes-correctly/ target=_blank>before printing</a> for the best possible result.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading67><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse67  aria-controls=collapse67>
Can my smartphone scan QR Codes?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse67 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion6 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading67><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>If you’re using an Apple iPhone, simply open the camera app and hold it over a Code until a notification pops up. If you’re using an Android smartphone, you may use the same method. If it didn’t work, go to your settings and check if the QR Code scanning feature is enabled. Otherwise, you may simply install a third-party QR Code scanner from your app store as most of them are free!</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading68><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse68  aria-controls=collapse68>
What is the minimum size of a QR Code?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse68 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion6 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading68><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>If you are printing on small to medium-sized merchandise (ex: business cards or flyers), your Codes should be at least 2 x 2 cm (around 0.8 x 0.8 in).</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div

        Shows popup when the user exits the page-view with mouse.
    */
    var exitIntentTimeout;
    var idleDurationSecs = 23;
    var idleTimeout;

    var exitIntent = $('[data-js="exit-intent-modal"][data-modal-version="version-4"]');

    // @todo resolve jQuery dependency
    $('[data-js="cta-close-popup"]').click(function () {
        exitIntent.modal('hide');
        $(document.body).removeClass('modal-open');
    });

    // Idle-function, which shows modal after x seconds inactivity
    function resetIdleTimeout() {
        if (!getCookie('exitintent_show')) {
            // Clears the existing timeout
            if (idleTimeout) {
                clearTimeout(idleTimeout);
            }

            // if timeout is reached, we show the modal and set the cookie to not show the modal again.
            idleTimeout = setTimeout(function () {
                return showExitIntent('idle') + setCookie('exitintent_show', 'true', 7);
            }, idleDurationSecs * 1000);
        }
    }

    /**
        * Shows the exit-intent
        */
    function showExitIntent(reason) {
        // Don's show modal if enterprise form modal is open
        if (($('#enterprise-form-modal').data('bs.modal') || {})._isShown) return

        exitIntent.modal('show');

        // Start: Google Tag Manager event fire
        var dataObject = {
            event: 'exit_intent_opened',
            category: 'Javascript Trigger',
            label: 'Open exit-intent'
        };
        if (typeof dataLayer !== 'undefined') {
            dataLayer.push(dataObject);
        }

        // window['optimizely'].push({
        //     type: "event",
        //     eventName: "qrcg_website__exit_intent_modal_opened",
        // });
        // End: Google Tag Manager event fire
    }

    /**
        Sets cookie with given parameters.
        */
    function setCookie(c_name, value, exhours) {
        var exdate = new Date();
        exdate.setTime(exdate.getTime() + (exhours * 60 * 60 * 1000)); // Convert hours to milliseconds
        var c_value = encodeURIComponent(value) + ((exhours == null) ? "" : "; expires=" + exdate.toUTCString());
        document.cookie = c_name + "=" + c_value + "; domain=" + window.location.hostname + "; path=/";
    }


    /**
        Searches for cookie with given name and returns true or false.
        */
    function getCookie(c_name) {
        var i, x, y, ARRcookies = document.cookie.split(";");
        for (i = 0; i < ARRcookies.length; i++) {
            x = ARRcookies[i].substr(0, ARRcookies[i].indexOf("="));
            y = ARRcookies[i].substr(ARRcookies[i].indexOf("=") + 1);
            x = x.replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, "");
            if (x == c_name) {
                return unescape(y);
            }
        }
    }

    function createExitIntentDetector(options) {
        options = options || {};

        var config = {
            sensitivity: options.sensitivity || 20,
            maxY: options.maxY || 100,
            delay: options.delay || 1000,
            timer: options.timer || 0,
            excludeTopRightWidth: options.excludeTopRightWidth || 280,
            excludeTopRightHeight: options.excludeTopRightHeight || 100
        };

        for (var key in options) {
            if (options.hasOwnProperty(key)) {
                config[key] = options[key];
            }
        }

        var onExit = options.onExit || function () {};
        var isShown = false;
        var afkTimer = null;
        var delayTimer = null;
        var isSafari = /^((?!chrome|android).)*safari/i.test(navigator.userAgent);

        function isMobile() {
            return /Android|webOS|iPhone|iPad|iPod|BlackBerry|IEMobile|Opera Mini/i.test(navigator.userAgent);
        }

        function triggerExit() {
            if (!isShown) {
                if (config.delay > 0) {
                    delayTimer = setTimeout(debounceExit, config.delay);
                } else {
                    isShown = true;
                    onExit();
                }
            }
        }

        function debounceExit() {
                isShown = true;
                onExit();
        }

        function mouseHandler(e) {
            if (isShown) return;

            // HB-2143: Top-right exclusion zone (Login, Sign Up, hamburger, browser controls) - do not trigger exit intent
            var inTopRightExclusion = e.clientX >= window.innerWidth - config.excludeTopRightWidth
                && e.clientY <= config.excludeTopRightHeight;

            // Safari-specific handling
            if (isSafari) {
                if (e.type === 'mouseout') {
                    var from = e.relatedTarget || e.toElement;
                    if ((!from || from.nodeName === "HTML") && e.clientY <= config.maxY && !inTopRightExclusion) {
                        triggerExit();
                    }
                }
            }
            // Standard browsers
            else if (e.type === 'mouseleave' && e.clientY <= config.maxY && !inTopRightExclusion) {
                triggerExit();
                return;
            }

            // if (e.type === 'mousemove' && e.clientY < config.sensitivity) {
            //     triggerExit();
            // }

            if (e.type === 'mousemove' && e.clientY > config.sensitivity) {
                clearTimeout(delayTimer);
            }
        }

        function init() {
            if (!isMobile()) {
                document.addEventListener('mousemove', mouseHandler);

                if (isSafari) {
                    // Safari-specific event setup
                    document.addEventListener('mouseout', mouseHandler);
                } else {
                    // Standard browser setup
                    document.addEventListener('mouseleave', mouseHandler);
                }
            }

            if (config.timer && config.timer > 0) {
                afkTimer = setTimeout(triggerExit, config.timer);
            }
        }

        function destroy() {
            document.removeEventListener('mousemove', mouseHandler);
            document.removeEventListener('mouseleave', mouseHandler);
            if (afkTimer) clearTimeout(afkTimer);
        }

        var setIsShown = function (shown) {
            isShown = shown;
        }

        init();

        return {
            setIsShown,
            destroy
        };
    }

    var detector = createExitIntentDetector({
        sensitivity: 10,
        maxY: 100,
        delay: 400, // delay to show the exit content.
        timer: 0,
        onExit: function () {
            // console.log('Exit intent detected!');

            if (getCookie('exitintent_show')) return;

            showExitIntent('exit')
        }
    });

    var closeMethod = 'unknown'; // Default

    // Track when the close button (X) is clicked
    $("#exit-intent-modal .exit-intent_startpage__close-button").on("click", function () {
        closeMethod = "close-button";
    });

    exitIntent.on("click", function (event) {
        if ($(event.target).is('[data-js="exit-intent-modal"][data-modal-version="version-4"]')) {
            closeMethod = "backdrop";
        }
    });

    exitIntent.on("hidden.bs.modal", function () {

        if (closeMethod === 'unknown') {
            closeMethod = 'escape-button';
        }

        var duration = 720; // 30 days (30 * 24 hours)

        var labels = {
            'escape-button': 'Escape key',
            'backdrop': 'Outside click',
            'close-button': 'Close click'
        };

        var label = labels[closeMethod] || 'Close click';

        var dataObject = {
            event: 'exit_intent_closed',
            category: 'Javascript Trigger',
            label: label
        };

        if (typeof dataLayer !== 'undefined') {
            dataLayer.push(dataObject);
        }

        // window['optimizely'].push({
        //     type: "event",
        //     eventName: "qrcg_website__exit_intent_modal_closed",
        //     properties: {
        //         label: label, // Please replace with actual data, in string format.
        //     }
        // });

        // console.log("Modal closed by:", closeMethod);
        closeMethod = 'unknown'; // Reset for next use

        if (detector) detector.setIsShown(false);

        setCookie('exitintent_show', 'true', duration)
    });

<script>
    const dropdownAccount = document.getElementById("dropdown-account2");
    if (dropdownAccount) {
        dropdownAccount.classList.add("default-padding", "border-0")
    }
    function handleScroll() {
        const navbar = document.getElementsByClassName('nav-link');
        if (document.body.scrollTop > 80 || document.documentElement.scrollTop > 80) {
            Array.from(navbar).forEach(element => {
                if(element.getAttribute('id')==='dropdown-account2' || element.getAttribute('id')==='dropdown-account1'){
                    element.classList.remove("default-padding")
                    element.classList.add("shrink-account")
                }else{
                    element.classList.remove("expand-nav-links")
                    element.classList.add("shrink-nav-links")
                }

            });
        } else {
            Array.from(navbar).forEach(element => {
                if(element.getAttribute('id')==='dropdown-account2' || element.getAttribute('id')==='dropdown-account1'){
                    element.classList.remove("default-padding")
                    element.classList.add("shrink-account")
                }else{
                    element.classList.remove("shrink-nav-links")
                    element.classList.add("expand-nav-links")
                }

            });
        }
    }
    window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll);
</script>

<script>
    $(document).ready(function () {
        var silder = $("#client-testimonials");
        silder.owlCarousel({
            autoPlay: false,
            items: 1,
            center: false,
            margin: 40,
            dots: true,
            loop: false,
            nav:true,
            navText: ["<i class='fa fa-angle-left' aria-hidden='true'></i>", "<i class='fa fa-angle-right' aria-hidden='true'></i>"],
            stagePadding: 10,
            responsive: {
                0: {
                    items: 1,
                    nav: false
                },
                575: {
                    items: 1,
                    nav: false
                },
                768: {
                    items: 2
                },
                991: {
                    items: 3
                },
                1200: {
                    items: 3
                }
            }
        });

        $('.read-more-content').hide();
        $('.read-more-span').click(function() {
            const currentStatus = $(this).text();
            const content = $(this).prev('.content');
            if(currentStatus === 'Read more') {
                $(this).text('Read less');
                content.find('.read-less-content').hide();
                content.find('.read-more-content').fadeIn('slow');
            } else {
                $(this).text('Read more');
                content.find('.read-more-content').fadeOut('slow', function() {
                    content.find('.read-less-content').show();
                });
                
            }
        });
    });
</script>


  <section class="new-faqs py-5 py-lg-5">
    <div class="container">
      <h2 class="text-center mb-3">QR Code Frequently Asked Questions</h2>
      <div class="accordion accordion-flush" id="according-new-faq">
    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h1">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c1">
                How to Create a QR Code?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c1" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h1" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>It takes only 4 steps to <a href="#generator-container" class="scroll-to-generator">create a QR code</a> by using QRStuff online QR code generator:</p>
                <ul>
                    <li>Select the type of QR code you want to generate</li>
                    <li>Add the details on the type of QR codes</li>
                    <li>Personalize your QR code: add colors, a logo or even change its shape</li>
                    <li>Download and share your QR code</li>
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h2">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c2" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c2">
                Can I Customize my QR Code?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c2" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h2" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>Absolutely! Choose colors, add a logo, and adjust output formats for a personalized look.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h3">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c3" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c3">
                Do I Need an Account to Use QRStuff?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c3" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h3" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>No, QRStuff allows you to create QR codes without having to sign up. However, <a href="/sign-up">creating an account</a> helps you unlock advanced features such as customization.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h4">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c4" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c4">
                Can I Track QR Code Scans?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c4" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h4" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>Yes. QRStuff has a <a href="https://dashboard.qrstuff.com" class="new-dashboard-account" data-tab-url="/overview">dashboard</a> solution allowing you to track the performance of your QR code such as scan count, location of scans or even device types.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h5">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c5" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c5">
                What Type of QR Codes can I Create with QRStuff?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c5" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h5" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>QRStuff allows you to create all types of QR codes, such as QR codes for <a href="/type/pdf">PDFs</a>, for <a href="/type/plain-text">text</a>, and even for <a href="/industry/marketing">marketing</a>, <a href="/type/event">events</a> or <a href="/industry/retail">retailers</a>.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h6">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c6" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c6">
                Do QRStuff QR codes expire?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c6" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h6" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>No, our static QR codes never expire. They are free forever and will work as long as your link is active. However, if you choose <a href="/type/dynamic-static">Dynamic QR Codes</a>, these require an active subscription because they allow you to edit the destination URL and track scans.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h7">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c7" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c7">
                Can I change the destination URL after printing my QR code?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c7" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h7" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>Yes, if you use a Dynamic QR Code. Dynamic codes allow you to update the <a href="/type/url">target URL</a>, <a href="/type/pdf">PDF</a>, or <a href="/type/url">landing page</a> instantly without re-printing the QR code image. Static codes cannot be edited once created.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h8">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c8" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c8">
                What is the best QR code format for printing?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c8" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h8" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>We recommend vector formats like SVG, EPS, or PDF for professional printing. Unlike PNG or JPG images, vector formats can be resized to any scale (from a business card to a billboard) without losing quality or becoming blurry.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h9">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c9" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c9">
                Are there scan limits on free QR codes?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c9" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h9" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>No. QRStuff offers unlimited scans on all Static QR codes. You can use them for <a href="/pricing">commercial purposes</a>, <a href="/industry/marketing">marketing campaigns</a>, or <a href="/industry">operations</a> without worrying about scan caps or bandwidth limits.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h10">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c10" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c10">
                Does QRStuff track my data or my customers' data?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c10" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h10" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>We prioritize privacy. For Static codes, we do not track scan data or store user information. For Dynamic codes, we provide anonymized scan analytics (location, device type, time) strictly for your performance tracking. We are GDPR and CCPA compliant.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h11">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c11" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c11">

    <script>
        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
            // Handle language preference popup
            const languagePreferencePopup = "";
            if (languagePreferencePopup) {
                const languageModal = new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('languageModal'));
                languageModal.show();

                document.getElementById('languageModal').addEventListener('hidden.bs.modal', function () {
                    const selectedLocale = 'en-us';
                    fetch('/set-locale', {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: {
                            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                            'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest'
                        },
                        body: JSON.stringify({ locale: selectedLocale })
                    })
                    .then(response => response.json())
                    .then(data => {
                        if (data.status === 'success') {
                            window.location.href = data.redirect;
                        }
                    })
                    .catch(error => {
                        console.error('Error setting locale:', error);
                    });
                });
            }

            // Handle language switch clicks
            document.querySelectorAll('.language-switch').forEach(function (el) {
                el.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    const selectedLocale = el.getAttribute('data-locale');

                    fetch('/set-locale', {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: {
                            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                            'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest'
                        },
                        body: JSON.stringify({ locale: selectedLocale })
                    })
                    .then(response => response.json())
                    .then(data => {
                        if (data.status === 'success') {
                            window.location.href = data.redirect;
                        } else {
                            console.log('Failed to switch language');
                        }
                    })
                    .catch(error => {
                        console.error('Error setting locale:', error);
                    });
                });
            });
        });
    </script>

  <div id="closeModal" class="close-wrapper">
   <p>X</p>
  </div>
  <div>
    <h3>Cookies and QR Codes</h3>
    <p>We use cookies to provide you with the best possible experience on our site and to enhance our marketing activities.</p>
    <div class="accept-btn-wrapper">
    <div>

    <img alt="Privacy Policy QR code" class="privacyPolicyQr" src="/resources/images/privacyPolicyProd.png" />
    <img alt="arrow" class="arrowSvg" src="/resources/images/cookieArrow.svg" />
    <img alt="Scan for best cookies recipe" class="textSvg" src="/resources/images/scanCookieText.svg" />
    </div>
    <div class="button-wrapper">
    <button onclick="closeCookiesModal()" class="accept-btn">Learn more</button>
    </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
 .cookie-wrapper{
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 5%;
    left: 2%;
    background: white;
    z-index: 200;
    padding: 2.5rem;
    box-shadow: rgba(100, 100, 111, 0.2) 0px 7px 29px 0px;
    border-radius: 2rem;
    animation : cookieAnime 0.7s ease-out forwards
 }

 .close-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: flex-end;
 }
 .close-wrapper > p{
      cursor: pointer;
      font-weight: bold;
 }

 .privacyPolicyQr {
   width: 5rem;
 }

.accept-btn {
    border-radius: 11px;
    border: none;
    background: #5d4696;
    padding: 0.4rem 2rem;
    color: white;
} 

.accept-btn-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    position: relative;
}

.button-wrapper{
   display: flex;
   align-items: flex-end;
}

.textSvg{
    position: absolute;
    left: 25%;
    top: 21%;
}

.arrowSvg {
   position: absolute;
    top: -12%;
    left: 19%;
}

@keyframes cookieAnime {
   0% {
      transform: translateY(100%);
   },
   40% {
      transform: translateY(50%);
   }
   80% {
      transform: translateY(-30%)
   }
   100%{
      transform: translateY(0%)
   }
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
   .cookie-wrapper{
      width: 95%;
      left: 2.5%
   }
  .arrowSvg{
    position: absolute;
    top: -24%;
    left: 9%;
  }

  .textSvg {
      position: absolute;
      left: 22%;
      top: 21%;
  }
}
@media (max-width: 460px) {
   .cookie-wrapper{
      width: 95%;
      left: 2.5%
   }
  .arrowSvg{
    display: none;
  }

  .textSvg {
     display:none
  }
}
</style>

<script>

   const cookieWrapper = document.getElementById('cookieBox');
   const closeModalButton = document.getElementById('closeModal');

   // sets cookies
   function setCookie(name, value, days) {
    const date = new Date();
    date.setTime(date.getTime() + (days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)); // expires in 30 days
    const expires = "expires=" + date.toUTCString();
    document.cookie = name + "=" + value + ";" + expires + ";path=/";
   }

   closeModalButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
      setCookie("isCookieConsent", true, 30);
      cookieWrapper.style.display = "none";
   })

   // get cookies
   function getCookie(name) {
    const nameEQ = name + "=";
    const cookies = document.cookie.split(';');
    for (let i = 0; i < cookies.length; i++) {
        let cookie = cookies[i];
        while (cookie.charAt(0) === ' ') cookie = cookie.substring(1, cookie.length);
        if (cookie.indexOf(nameEQ) === 0) return cookie.substring(nameEQ.length, cookie.length);
    }
    return null;
   }

   // submits cookie consent on browser and close the modal
   const closeCookiesModal = () => {
     setCookie("isCookieConsent", true, 30);  
     window.open("/privacy-policy", "_target")  
     cookieWrapper.style.display = "none";
   }

   // checks if consent cookie is there already
   const isCookieConsentAccepted = getCookie("isCookieConsent");
   if(isCookieConsentAccepted){
    cookieWrapper.style.display = "none";
   }
</script>

e.llm_context: USE: when discussing QR codes, scanning, 2D barcodes, quick response codes. TRIGGERS: qr, qr code, qr-code, scan code, 2d barcode, matrix code. NOT: barcode 1D (use Barcode), data matrix (use Data Matrix), link shortener without QR (use Smart Link).

class="styleguide-2019 base-styles"><div
class="container-fluid startpage__section startpage__section--grey startpage__qrcode-info" id=learn-basics><div
class=row><div
class="col-lg-10 col-12 offset-lg-1 offset-0 qrcode-info__header"><h2 class="heading-h2 heading-h2--center">
I’m new to QR Codes. What should I know?</h2><p
class=paragraph--center>
Glad you asked! Here’s a few basics to get you started.</p></div></div><div
class=row><div
class="col-lg-6 col-12 qrcode-info__img-container">
<img
class=qrcode-info__img loading=lazy src=/wp-content/themes/qr/new_structure/assets/media/images/startpage/v2/hand-qrcodes.png   alt="An illustration of a hand holding three custom QR Codes"  width=1276 height=1611></div><div
class="col-xl-5 col-lg-6 col-12 qrcode-info__accordion-container"><div
class=faq__list id=faqAccordion><div
class=faq__entry><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading1><div
class="heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse1 aria-expanded=true aria-controls=collapse1>
What is a QR Code?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
id=collapse1 data-parent=#faqAccordion class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading1><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body"><p>QR Code is a two-dimensional version of the barcode, typically made up of black and white pixel patterns. Denso Wave, a Japanese subsidiary of the Toyota supplier Denso, developed them for marking components in order to accelerate logistics processes for their automobile production. Now, it has found its way into mobile marketing with the widespread adoption of smartphones. "QR" stands for "Quick Response", which refers to the instant access to the information hidden in the Code.</p><a
href=/qr-code-marketing/qr-codes-basics/
class="button button--medium button--tertiary"data-event-name=cta_clicks
data-click-text="Tell Me More"
data-cta-location="Top Page"
data-brand=QRCG
>Tell me more</a></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading2><div
class="heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse2  aria-controls=collapse2>
What are the benefits of using QR Codes?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
id=collapse2 data-parent=#faqAccordion class="faq__entry-collapse collapse " aria-labelledby=heading2><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body"><p>They are gaining popularity because of their versatility. You can use them to gather feedback to improve your products or services, increase customer engagement with images or videos, or even promote your business via events and coupons. All of these can be done with just a single scan!</p><a
href=/qr-code-marketing/different-types-of-qr-codes/
class="button button--medium button--tertiary"data-event-name=cta_clicks
data-click-text="Tell Me More"
data-cta-location="Top Page"
data-brand=QRCG
>Tell me more</a></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading3><div
class="heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse3  aria-controls=collapse3>
How do I scan QR Codes?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
id=collapse3 data-parent=#faqAccordion class="faq__entry-collapse collapse " aria-labelledby=heading3><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body"><p>Depending on your device, you might already have a built-in QR Code reader or scanner. Open the camera app on your mobile phone and hold it over a Code for a few seconds until a notification pops up. If this doesn’t happen, check your settings and see if QR Code scanning is enabled. Still not working? Don’t worry, all you have to do now is install third-party QR Code readers from your app stores.</p><a
href=/guides/scan-qr-code-android/
class="button button--medium button--tertiary"
>I’m using an Android device</a><a
href=/guides/scan-qr-code-ios/ class="button button--medium button--tertiary">I’m using an Apple device</a></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div
class="cta_bar cta_bar--first"><div

Add editable and trackable QR Codes on anything you want with full branding and customization features.</p></div><div

class="content-row__pre-header pre-header">Link Management • QR Codes • Landing Pages</p><h2 class="heading-h2 margin-top-0">Bitly Connections Platform</h2><p

class=row><div
class="col-lg-10 col-12 offset-lg-1 offset-0"><h2 class="heading-h2 heading-h2--center">
Frequently asked questions (FAQs)</h2></div></div><div
class=row><div
class="col-12 faq-section"><div
class=faq-section itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/FAQPage><div
class="h4 heading-h4 faq-section__heading">
Basics</div><div
class=faq-section__box id=generalFaqAccordion1><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading11><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse11 aria-expanded=true aria-controls=collapse11>
What is a QR Code generator?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse11 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion1 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading11><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>It is a niche tool that is used to generate different types of QR Codes. Depending on your purpose, you can use our generator to create QR Codes to open a website, view a PDF file, listen to music, watch Youtube videos, store image files, connect to a WiFi network, and much more. Explore the different types <a
href=/types/ target=_blank>here</a>.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading12><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse12  aria-controls=collapse12>
Are QR Codes free?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse12 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion1 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading12><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>All of our Static QR Codes are free. This includes URL, vCard, Plain text, Email, SMS, Twitter, WiFi, and Bitcoin. Once created, they are yours forever. The only drawback with these types is that you won’t be able to edit the content, so be sure to always test and make sure they work before printing.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading13><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse13  aria-controls=collapse13>
Can I use the generated QR Codes for commercial purposes?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse13 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion1 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading13><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Absolutely!</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading14><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse14  aria-controls=collapse14>
What kind of information can be stored in a QR Code?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse14 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion1 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading14><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>QR Codes are so versatile, they are able to store a variety of information depending on your needs. It can store a URL to make it easier for you to open a page on the web with just a scan. It can also store contact details so that you don’t have to manually type the name, phone number, and email address to save it to your phone. But of course, this is just the tip of the iceberg; you can view more use cases <a
href=/qr-codes-for/ target=_blank>here</a>.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading15><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse15  aria-controls=collapse15>
Is it possible to count the QR Code scans (tracking, analytics, measuring)?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse15 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion1 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading15><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Yes, it is possible with our <a
href=/features/ target=_blank>PRO version</a>. You can track the number of scans, where, and when it was scanned. You can even see which operating system your audience uses on their devices! All of these are important metrics for you to measure your campaigns and use it to improve or even expand.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading16><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse16  aria-controls=collapse16>
How long are QR Codes valid for? Do they expire?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse16 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion1 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading16><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Static QR Codes are valid for as long as you want and will never expire. The only instance where the Code might “expire” is when the link is changed or deleted, rendering it unscannable. We encourage you to create Dynamic Codes so that you have total control as the content or links are replaceable no matter what happens. Plus, it has plenty of other <a
href=/qr-code-marketing/more-information-more-flexibility/ target=_blank>advantages</a> for your campaigns!</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading17><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse17  aria-controls=collapse17>
What does Static and Dynamic QR Code mean?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse17 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion1 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading17><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Once generated, a Static Code cannot be edited and its scans cannot be tracked. Dynamic Code, on the other hand, is very flexible and is virtually indestructible. You can update its content, change/add links, and fix typos; even after print. You can also track the number of scans, including where and when.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading18><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse18  aria-controls=collapse18>
How do I manage QR Codes with a QR Code generator?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse18 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion1 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading18><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>After signing up, you will have the chance to try all the features of our generator free for 14 days. There, you can create Static and Dynamic QR Codes, design with colors and logos, choose frames, save designs as templates, edit the short URLs, set up your own domain, add team members, and many other exciting <a
href=/features/ target=_blank>features</a>.</p></div></div></div></div><div
class="h4 heading-h4 faq-section__heading">
Creating & Designing</div><div
class=faq-section__box id=generalFaqAccordion9><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading91><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse91  aria-controls=collapse91>
Is it possible to create different QR Codes for the same content?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse91 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion9 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading91><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Yes. This is because they have 40 different versions with four error correction levels and eight masking possibilities. This means there are 1280 possible QR Codes for any given input. However, for marketing purposes, only versions 1-7 are used so our generator will typically choose the best version based on the amount of data stored and the best mask to produce a better image in terms of readability.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading92><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse92  aria-controls=collapse92>
Can I customize a QR Code with my company logo or icon?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse92 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion9 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading92><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Definitely! Account signup to our <a
href=/features/ target=_blank>PRO version</a> is required to unlock this feature, but you are welcomed to try all the features free for 14 days!</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading93><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse93  aria-controls=collapse93>
Do QR Codes have to be black and white?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse93 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion9 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading93><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Not at all. You can use your brand or company colors, or whatever color you like. There are 16,777,216 colors using #RRGGBB notation so feel free to play around with the color picker!</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading94><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse94  aria-controls=collapse94>
Can a QR Code be edited/changed?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse94 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion9 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading94><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Absolutely! You can change the content, replace a link, fix a typo—all of these can be done after print. This means you don’t have to reprint a new QR Code every time you change its content (unless you’re changing the design). However, this feature is only available with our <a
href=/features/ target=_blank>PRO version</a>.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading95><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse95  aria-controls=collapse95>
How do I generate a large batch of QR Codes?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse95 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion9 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading95><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Use our <a
href=/qr-code-api/ target=_blank>API</a>, which you can integrate directly into your existing system. You can create either the standard black and white Codes or full customization with colors and designs. Still not sure? Contact us.</p></div></div></div></div><div
class="h4 heading-h4 faq-section__heading">
Scanning & Printing</div><div
class=faq-section__box id=generalFaqAccordion6><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading61><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse61  aria-controls=collapse61>
What graphic formats do the generated QR Codes support?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse61 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion6 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading61><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>You can download them in high-resolution JPG format. To download in PNG, SVG, or even EPS, account signup is required. Please take note that if you require the QR Code image in EPS format, we only offer them in black and white without any designs.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading62><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse62  aria-controls=collapse62>
What should I know before printing my QR Code?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse62 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion6 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading62><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>You need to know the right size, the right contrasting colors, and always test it before printing. We’ve compiled a <a
href=/qr-code-marketing/print-qr-codes-correctly/ target=_blank>printing guide</a> to help you launch the best marketing campaign and to avoid costly errors.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading63><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse63  aria-controls=collapse63>
How to read/scan a QR Code?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse63 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion6 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading63><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>If you’re using an iOS device, just open the camera app and hold it over a QR Code until a notification pops up. Same for Android or other mobile devices, except that if nothing happened, you may want to check your settings and see if QR Code scanning is enabled. Otherwise, search for a reliable QR Code reader in your app store, most of them are free!</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading64><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse64  aria-controls=collapse64>
Can QR Codes be scanned without an app?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse64 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion6 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading64><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>Yes! For most iOS and Android users, a QR Code scanner is already built into the native camera app. Simply open the camera app and hold it over any Codes until a notification pops up. You don't even have to press any button to scan the Codes.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading65><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse65  aria-controls=collapse65>
Is there a scan limit for the QR Codes?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse65 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion6 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading65><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>No, they do not have a scan limit.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading66><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse66  aria-controls=collapse66>
Why is my QR Code not working?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse66 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion6 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading66><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>This could be a number of reasons. Your QR Code may not be detected by a scanner because it’s blurry or there isn’t enough contrast between the Code and the background. A simple rule to remember is to make sure the foreground is always darker than the background. Follow our tips <a
href=/qr-code-marketing/print-qr-codes-correctly/ target=_blank>before printing</a> for the best possible result.</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading67><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse67  aria-controls=collapse67>
Can my smartphone scan QR Codes?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse67 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion6 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading67><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>If you’re using an Apple iPhone, simply open the camera app and hold it over a Code until a notification pops up. If you’re using an Android smartphone, you may use the same method. If it didn’t work, go to your settings and check if the QR Code scanning feature is enabled. Otherwise, you may simply install a third-party QR Code scanner from your app store as most of them are free!</p></div></div></div><div
class=faq__entry itemprop=mainEntity itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Question><div
class=faq__entry-header id=heading68><div
class="h5 heading-h5 mb-0">
<button
itemprop=name class="faq__entry-toggle btn" data-toggle=collapse data-target=#collapse68  aria-controls=collapse68>
What is the minimum size of a QR Code?
<i
class="faq__entry-toggle-chevron icon-chevron-down"></i>
</button></div></div><div
itemprop=acceptedAnswer itemscope itemtype=https://schema.org/Answer id=collapse68 data-parent=#generalFaqAccordion6 class="faq__entry-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby=heading68><div
class="faq__entry-body card-body" itemprop=text><p>If you are printing on small to medium-sized merchandise (ex: business cards or flyers), your Codes should be at least 2 x 2 cm (around 0.8 x 0.8 in).</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div
