    var exitIntentTimeout;
    var idleDurationSecs = 23;
    var idleTimeout;

    var exitIntent = $('[data-js="exit-intent-modal"][data-modal-version="version-4"]');

    // @todo resolve jQuery dependency
    $('[data-js="cta-close-popup"]').click(function () {

        $(document.body).removeClass('modal-open');
    });

    // Idle-function, which shows modal after x seconds inactivity
    function resetIdleTimeout() {
        if (!getCookie('exitintent_show')) {
            // Clears the existing timeout
            if (idleTimeout) {
                clearTimeout(idleTimeout);
            }

            // if timeout is reached, we show the modal and set the cookie to not show the modal again.
            idleTimeout = setTimeout(function () {
                return showExitIntent('idle') + setCookie('exitintent_show', 'true', 7);
            }, idleDurationSecs * 1000);
        }
    }

    /**
        * Shows the exit-intent
        */
    function showExitIntent(reason) {
        // Don's show modal if enterprise form modal is open
        if (($('#enterprise-form-modal').data('bs.modal') || {})._isShown) return

        exitIntent.modal('show');

        // Start: Google Tag Manager event fire
        var dataObject = {
            event: 'exit_intent_opened',
            category: 'Javascript Trigger',
            label: 'Open exit-intent'
        };
        if (typeof dataLayer !== 'undefined') {
            dataLayer.push(dataObject);
        }

        // window['optimizely'].push({
        //     type: "event",
        //     eventName: "qrcg_website__exit_intent_modal_opened",
        // });
        // End: Google Tag Manager event fire
    }

    /**
        Sets cookie with given parameters.
        */
    function setCookie(c_name, value, exhours) {
        var exdate = new Date();
        exdate.setTime(exdate.getTime() + (exhours * 60 * 60 * 1000)); // Convert hours to milliseconds
        var c_value = encodeURIComponent(value) + ((exhours == null) ? "" : "; expires=" + exdate.toUTCString());
        document.cookie = c_name + "=" + c_value + "; domain=" + window.location.hostname + "; path=/";
    }


    /**
        Searches for cookie with given name and returns true or false.
        */
    function getCookie(c_name) {
        var i, x, y, ARRcookies = document.cookie.split(";");
        for (i = 0; i < ARRcookies.length; i++) {
            x = ARRcookies[i].substr(0, ARRcookies[i].indexOf("="));
            y = ARRcookies[i].substr(ARRcookies[i].indexOf("=") + 1);
            x = x.replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, "");
            if (x == c_name) {
                return unescape(y);
            }
        }
    }

    function createExitIntentDetector(options) {
        options = options || {};

        var config = {
            sensitivity: options.sensitivity || 20,
            maxY: options.maxY || 100,
            delay: options.delay || 1000,
            timer: options.timer || 0,
            excludeTopRightWidth: options.excludeTopRightWidth || 280,
            excludeTopRightHeight: options.excludeTopRightHeight || 100
        };

        for (var key in options) {
            if (options.hasOwnProperty(key)) {
                config[key] = options[key];
            }
        }

        var onExit = options.onExit || function () {};
        var isShown = false;
        var afkTimer = null;
        var delayTimer = null;
        var isSafari = /^((?!chrome|android).)*safari/i.test(navigator.userAgent);

        function isMobile() {
            return /Android|webOS|iPhone|iPad|iPod|BlackBerry|IEMobile|Opera Mini/i.test(navigator.userAgent);
        }

        function triggerExit() {
            if (!isShown) {
                if (config.delay > 0) {
                    delayTimer = setTimeout(debounceExit, config.delay);
                } else {
                    isShown = true;
                    onExit();
                }
            }
        }

        function debounceExit() {
                isShown = true;
                onExit();
        }

        function mouseHandler(e) {
            if (isShown) return;

            // HB-2143: Top-right exclusion zone (Login, Sign Up, hamburger, browser controls) - do not trigger exit intent
            var inTopRightExclusion = e.clientX >= window.innerWidth - config.excludeTopRightWidth
                && e.clientY <= config.excludeTopRightHeight;

            // Safari-specific handling
            if (isSafari) {
                if (e.type === 'mouseout') {
                    var from = e.relatedTarget || e.toElement;
                    if ((!from || from.nodeName === "HTML") && e.clientY <= config.maxY && !inTopRightExclusion) {
                        triggerExit();
                    }
                }
            }
            // Standard browsers
            else if (e.type === 'mouseleave' && e.clientY <= config.maxY && !inTopRightExclusion) {
                triggerExit();
                return;
            }

            // if (e.type === 'mousemove' && e.clientY < config.sensitivity) {
            //     triggerExit();
            // }

            if (e.type === 'mousemove' && e.clientY > config.sensitivity) {
                clearTimeout(delayTimer);
            }
        }

        function init() {
            if (!isMobile()) {
                document.addEventListener('mousemove', mouseHandler);

                if (isSafari) {
                    // Safari-specific event setup
                    document.addEventListener('mouseout', mouseHandler);
                } else {
                    // Standard browser setup
                    document.addEventListener('mouseleave', mouseHandler);
                }
            }

            if (config.timer && config.timer > 0) {
                afkTimer = setTimeout(triggerExit, config.timer);
            }
        }

        function destroy() {
            document.removeEventListener('mousemove', mouseHandler);
            document.removeEventListener('mouseleave', mouseHandler);
            if (afkTimer) clearTimeout(afkTimer);
        }

        var setIsShown = function (shown) {
            isShown = shown;
        }

        init();

        return {
            setIsShown,
            destroy
        };
    }

    var detector = createExitIntentDetector({
        sensitivity: 10,
        maxY: 100,
        delay: 400, // delay to show the exit content.
        timer: 0,
        onExit: function () {
            // console.log('Exit intent detected!');

            if (getCookie('exitintent_show')) return;

            showExitIntent('exit')
        }
    });

    var closeMethod = 'unknown'; // Default

    // Track when the close button (X) is clicked
    $("#exit-intent-modal .exit-intent_startpage__close-button").on("click", function () {
        closeMethod = "close-button";
    });

            closeMethod = "backdrop";
        }
    });

    exitIntent.on("hidden.bs.modal", function () {

            closeMethod = 'escape-button';
        }

        var labels = {
            'escape-button': 'Escape key',

        };

    .accordion-button:after {
        margin-left: 10px !important;
    }

    .accordion-button:not(.collapsed) {
        background-color: transparent !important;
        box-shadow: none !important;
    }

    .solution-list:hover {
        background-color: #e9ecef;
        transition: all ease 0.1s;
        border-radius: 5px;
    }

    .solution-list .solution-links {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        padding-left: 10px;
        padding-right: 10px;
        text-decoration: none;
        color: inherit;
    }

    .solution-list .solution-links:hover {
        cursor: pointer;
    }

    .solution-list > .solution-links > div {
        flex-shrink: 0;
        width: 1rem;
        height: 1rem;
        margin-right: 10px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
    }

    .more-text {
        flex-shrink: 0;
        margin-right: 10px;

<script>
    const dropdownAccount = document.getElementById("dropdown-account2");
    if (dropdownAccount) {
        dropdownAccount.classList.add("default-padding", "border-0")
    }
    function handleScroll() {
        const navbar = document.getElementsByClassName('nav-link');
        if (document.body.scrollTop > 80 || document.documentElement.scrollTop > 80) {
            Array.from(navbar).forEach(element => {
                if(element.getAttribute('id')==='dropdown-account2' || element.getAttribute('id')==='dropdown-account1'){
                    element.classList.remove("default-padding")
                    element.classList.add("shrink-account")
                }else{
                    element.classList.remove("expand-nav-links")
                    element.classList.add("shrink-nav-links")
                }

            });
        } else {
            Array.from(navbar).forEach(element => {
                if(element.getAttribute('id')==='dropdown-account2' || element.getAttribute('id')==='dropdown-account1'){
                    element.classList.remove("default-padding")
                    element.classList.add("shrink-account")
                }else{
                    element.classList.remove("shrink-nav-links")
                    element.classList.add("expand-nav-links")
                }

            });
        }
    }
    window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll);
</script>

<script>
    $(document).ready(function () {
        var silder = $("#client-testimonials");
        silder.owlCarousel({
            autoPlay: false,
            items: 1,
            center: false,
            margin: 40,
            dots: true,
            loop: false,
            nav:true,
            navText: ["<i class='fa fa-angle-left' aria-hidden='true'></i>", "<i class='fa fa-angle-right' aria-hidden='true'></i>"],
            stagePadding: 10,
            responsive: {
                0: {
                    items: 1,
                    nav: false
                },
                575: {
                    items: 1,
                    nav: false
                },
                768: {
                    items: 2
                },
                991: {
                    items: 3
                },
                1200: {
                    items: 3
                }
            }
        });

        $('.read-more-content').hide();
        $('.read-more-span').click(function() {
            const currentStatus = $(this).text();
            const content = $(this).prev('.content');
            if(currentStatus === 'Read more') {
                $(this).text('Read less');
                content.find('.read-less-content').hide();
                content.find('.read-more-content').fadeIn('slow');
            } else {
                $(this).text('Read more');
                content.find('.read-more-content').fadeOut('slow', function() {
                    content.find('.read-less-content').show();
                });
                
            }
        });
    });
</script>


  <section class="new-faqs py-5 py-lg-5">
    <div class="container">
      <h2 class="text-center mb-3">QR Code Frequently Asked Questions</h2>
      <div class="accordion accordion-flush" id="according-new-faq">
    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h1">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c1" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c1">
                How to Create a QR Code?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c1" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h1" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>It takes only 4 steps to <a href="#generator-container" class="scroll-to-generator">create a QR code</a> by using QRStuff online QR code generator:</p>
                <ul>
                    <li>Select the type of QR code you want to generate</li>
                    <li>Add the details on the type of QR codes</li>
                    <li>Personalize your QR code: add colors, a logo or even change its shape</li>
                    <li>Download and share your QR code</li>
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h2">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c2" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c2">
                Can I Customize my QR Code?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c2" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h2" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>Absolutely! Choose colors, add a logo, and adjust output formats for a personalized look.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h3">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c3" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c3">
                Do I Need an Account to Use QRStuff?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c3" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h3" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>No, QRStuff allows you to create QR codes without having to sign up. However, <a href="/sign-up">creating an account</a> helps you unlock advanced features such as customization.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h4">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c4" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c4">
                Can I Track QR Code Scans?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c4" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h4" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>Yes. QRStuff has a <a href="https://dashboard.qrstuff.com" class="new-dashboard-account" data-tab-url="/overview">dashboard</a> solution allowing you to track the performance of your QR code such as scan count, location of scans or even device types.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h5">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c5" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c5">
                What Type of QR Codes can I Create with QRStuff?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c5" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h5" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>QRStuff allows you to create all types of QR codes, such as QR codes for <a href="/type/pdf">PDFs</a>, for <a href="/type/plain-text">text</a>, and even for <a href="/industry/marketing">marketing</a>, <a href="/type/event">events</a> or <a href="/industry/retail">retailers</a>.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h6">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c6" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c6">
                Do QRStuff QR codes expire?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c6" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h6" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>No, our static QR codes never expire. They are free forever and will work as long as your link is active. However, if you choose <a href="/type/dynamic-static">Dynamic QR Codes</a>, these require an active subscription because they allow you to edit the destination URL and track scans.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h7">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c7" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c7">
                Can I change the destination URL after printing my QR code?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c7" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h7" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>Yes, if you use a Dynamic QR Code. Dynamic codes allow you to update the <a href="/type/url">target URL</a>, <a href="/type/pdf">PDF</a>, or <a href="/type/url">landing page</a> instantly without re-printing the QR code image. Static codes cannot be edited once created.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h8">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c8" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c8">
                What is the best QR code format for printing?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c8" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h8" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>We recommend vector formats like SVG, EPS, or PDF for professional printing. Unlike PNG or JPG images, vector formats can be resized to any scale (from a business card to a billboard) without losing quality or becoming blurry.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h9">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c9" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c9">
                Are there scan limits on free QR codes?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c9" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h9" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>No. QRStuff offers unlimited scans on all Static QR codes. You can use them for <a href="/pricing">commercial purposes</a>, <a href="/industry/marketing">marketing campaigns</a>, or <a href="/industry">operations</a> without worrying about scan caps or bandwidth limits.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h10">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c10" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c10">
                Does QRStuff track my data or my customers' data?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c10" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h10" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>We prioritize privacy. For Static codes, we do not track scan data or store user information. For Dynamic codes, we provide anonymized scan analytics (location, device type, time) strictly for your performance tracking. We are GDPR and CCPA compliant.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
        <h3 class="accordion-header" id="new-faq-h11">
            <button class="accordion-button custom-accordion-button fw-bold collapsed" type="button"
                    data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#new-faq-c11" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="new-faq-c11">
                Can I create a QR code for WiFi access or a Digital Business Card?
            </button>
        </h3>
        <div id="new-faq-c11" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="new-faq-h11" data-bs-parent="#according-new-faq">
            <div class="accordion-body">
                <p>Yes. We support over 25 data types. You can create a <a href="/type/wifi">WiFi QR code</a> to let guests join a network instantly without typing passwords, or a <a href="/type/vcard">vCard QR</a> to share contact details directly to a phone's address book.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

    <script>
        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
            // Handle language preference popup
            const languagePreferencePopup = "";
            if (languagePreferencePopup) {
                const languageModal = new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('languageModal'));
                languageModal.show();

                document.getElementById('languageModal').addEventListener('hidden.bs.modal', function () {
                    const selectedLocale = 'en-us';
                    fetch('/set-locale', {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: {
                            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                            'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest'
                        },
                        body: JSON.stringify({ locale: selectedLocale })
                    })
                    .then(response => response.json())
                    .then(data => {
                        if (data.status === 'success') {
                            window.location.href = data.redirect;
                        }
                    })
                    .catch(error => {
                        console.error('Error setting locale:', error);
                    });
                });
            }

            // Handle language switch clicks
            document.querySelectorAll('.language-switch').forEach(function (el) {
                el.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    const selectedLocale = el.getAttribute('data-locale');

                    fetch('/set-locale', {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: {
                            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                            'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest'
                        },
                        body: JSON.stringify({ locale: selectedLocale })
                    })
                    .then(response => response.json())
                    .then(data => {
                        if (data.status === 'success') {
                            window.location.href = data.redirect;
                        } else {
                            console.log('Failed to switch language');
                        }
                    })
                    .catch(error => {
                        console.error('Error setting locale:', error);
                    });
                });
            });
        });
    </script>

    <div id="cookieBox" class="cookie-wrapper col-md-6 col-lg-4">
  <div id="closeModal" class="close-wrapper">
   <p>X</p>
  </div>
  <div>
    <h3>Cookies and QR Codes</h3>
    <p>We use cookies to provide you with the best possible experience on our site and to enhance our marketing activities.</p>
    <div class="accept-btn-wrapper">
    <div>

    <img alt="Privacy Policy QR code" class="privacyPolicyQr" src="/resources/images/privacyPolicyProd.png" />
    <img alt="arrow" class="arrowSvg" src="/resources/images/cookieArrow.svg" />
    <img alt="Scan for best cookies recipe" class="textSvg" src="/resources/images/scanCookieText.svg" />
    </div>
    <div class="button-wrapper">
    <button onclick="closeCookiesModal()" class="accept-btn">Learn more</button>
    </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
 .cookie-wrapper{
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 5%;
    left: 2%;
    background: white;
    z-index: 200;
    padding: 2.5rem;
    box-shadow: rgba(100, 100, 111, 0.2) 0px 7px 29px 0px;
    border-radius: 2rem;
    animation : cookieAnime 0.7s ease-out forwards
 }

 .close-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: flex-end;
 }
 .close-wrapper > p{
      cursor: pointer;
      font-weight: bold;
 }

 .privacyPolicyQr {
   width: 5rem;
 }

.accept-btn {
    border-radius: 11px;
    border: none;
    background: #5d4696;
    padding: 0.4rem 2rem;
    color: white;
} 

.accept-btn-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    position: relative;
}

.button-wrapper{
   display: flex;
   align-items: flex-end;
}

.textSvg{
    position: absolute;
    left: 25%;
    top: 21%;
}

.arrowSvg {
   position: absolute;
    top: -12%;
    left: 19%;
}

@keyframes cookieAnime {
   0% {
      transform: translateY(100%);
   },
   40% {
      transform: translateY(50%);
   }
   80% {
      transform: translateY(-30%)
   }
   100%{
      transform: translateY(0%)
   }
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
   .cookie-wrapper{
      width: 95%;
      left: 2.5%
   }
  .arrowSvg{
    position: absolute;
    top: -24%;
    left: 9%;
  }

  .textSvg {
      position: absolute;
      left: 22%;
      top: 21%;
  }
}
@media (max-width: 460px) {
   .cookie-wrapper{
      width: 95%;
      left: 2.5%
   }
  .arrowSvg{
    display: none;
  }

  .textSvg {
     display:none
  }
}
</style>

<script>

   const cookieWrapper = document.getElementById('cookieBox');
   const closeModalButton = document.getElementById('closeModal');

   // sets cookies
   function setCookie(name, value, days) {
    const date = new Date();
    date.setTime(date.getTime() + (days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)); // expires in 30 days
    const expires = "expires=" + date.toUTCString();
    document.cookie = name + "=" + value + ";" + expires + ";path=/";
   }

   closeModalButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
      setCookie("isCookieConsent", true, 30);
      cookieWrapper.style.display = "none";
   })

   // get cookies
   function getCookie(name) {
    const nameEQ = name + "=";
    const cookies = document.cookie.split(';');
    for (let i = 0; i < cookies.length; i++) {
        let cookie = cookies[i];
        while (cookie.charAt(0) === ' ') cookie = cookie.substring(1, cookie.length);
        if (cookie.indexOf(nameEQ) === 0) return cookie.substring(nameEQ.length, cookie.length);
    }
    return null;
   }

   // submits cookie consent on browser and close the modal
   const closeCookiesModal = () => {
     setCookie("isCookieConsent", true, 30);  
     window.open("/privacy-policy", "_target")  
     cookieWrapper.style.display = "none";
   }

   // checks if consent cookie is there already
   const isCookieConsentAccepted = getCookie("isCookieConsent");
   if(isCookieConsentAccepted){
    cookieWrapper.style.display = "none";
   }
</script>

</div>

kind.result:
You are an SEO expert. Score these keywords using the methodology below.

**SEO Persona & Scoring Rules:**
# SEO Expert Persona

## Role
You are a senior SEO specialist with expertise in:
- Keyword research and analysis
- Search intent classification
- Semantic SEO relationships
- Multi-locale SEO strategy

## Scoring Formula
```
score = volume * sem_coef * intent_boost * trend_factor

Where:
- sem_coef: same_as=1.0, action_for=0.95, produces=0.85, subtopic_of=0.70, related_to=0.50, attribute_of=0.30
- intent_boost: transactional=1.2, commercial=1.1, informational=1.0, navigational=0.8
- trend_factor: rising=1.2, stable=1.0, declining=0.7
```

## Semantic Relations
| Relation | Description | Example |
|----------|-------------|---------|
| same_as | Synonym or equivalent | "qr code" = "code qr" |
| action_for | Action verb + entity | "create qr code" |
| produces | Output of action | "qr code image" |
| subtopic_of | Narrower concept | "wifi qr code" |
| related_to | Associated concept | "barcode" |
| attribute_of | Property/feature | "dynamic qr code" |

## Validation Criteria
1. Relevance to core entity (QR Code)
2. Commercial viability (volume + intent)
3. Competitive landscape
4. Locale-specific nuances
